introHowToPlay.text: Drop hook to catch protection and education assets!
Avoid Loan Sharks, inflation jellyfish, and market crash mines.
Spend Protection Points to upgrade your fishing rod, reel, and sonar.

copy.scoringTagline: Deep-sea wealth needs solid protection. Secure your yields against life hazards today!
copy.scoringCtaLine: Protect your family's future and build lasting wealth. Book a free consultation slot!
copy.thankYouBody: Your request has been successfully submitted! A Relationship Manager from Bajaj Allianz Life will connect with you shortly to guide you on your wealth protection journey.

contact.disclaimer: THE RESULTS SHOWN IN THIS GAME ARE INDICATIVE AND FOR ENGAGEMENT PURPOSES ONLY. THEY DO NOT CONSTITUTE FINANCIAL ADVICE OR A BINDING OFFER. INSURANCE IS THE SUBJECT MATTER OF SOLICITATION. PARTICIPANTS SHOULD CONSULT PROFESSIONAL ADVISORS BEFORE PURCHASING ANY POLICY. {COMPANY} ASSUMES NO LIABILITY FOR ACTIONS TAKEN BASED ON GAMEPLAY OUTCOMES.
contact.tcText: I hereby authorize {COMPANY} and its representatives to contact me via phone call, SMS, or WhatsApp regarding products and services. I declare that this request overrides any registration of my number on the National Customer Preference Register (NCPR) or DNC Registry.
